chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2202 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.991/2025 (C/A) 26.03.2025 Mr. Badaruddin Indher, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Naheed Ahmed Mirani, ADC-I, Sukkur and Rida Talpur, Assistant Commissioner, Pano Akil and Muhammad Ali, Mukhtiarkar. >>>>>..<<<<< Statements have been filed by Contemnors No.1, 2 and 4, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the Petitioner. Perusal of the statements reflects that the order of this Court has been complied with, therefore, no case for further interference is made-out. The listed application (CMA No.991/2025) is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
